prompts: Cinematic, Japanese fantasy RPG guild workshop, warm wood textures. Sora Mistfell, an androgynous crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron, steadies a dented shield on a wooden workbench. Sora Emberlane, a feminine scout in a cropped travel jacket, carefully guides a safe repair tool over the metal surface. Soft ambient forge light, cooperative posture, high-quality anime art style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild workshop. Sora Emberlane taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Sora Mistfell maintains a firm, steady grip on the workbench. The two characters exchange a friendly look of accomplishment. Consistent warm lighting, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
